summary_en: 700,000 shares (2.40% of outstanding), ¥700M upper limit, open-market purchases on Tokyo Stock Exchange, June 1 – August 31, 2026. Stated purpose: shareholder returns and capital-efficiency improvement.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Pursuant to Article 156 of the Companies Act, as Applied by Restatement Under Article 165(3) of the Same Act)
translation_en_brief: Fujikura Kasei resolved on May 14, 2026 to acquire up to 700,000 of its ordinary shares (2.40% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum total of ¥700M. Purchases will occur via open-market transactions on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between June 1 and August 31, 2026. The board cited shareholder returns and improved capital efficiency as the rationale. At March 31, 2026, the company held 1,688,626 treasury shares against 29,161,374 outstanding shares.
